name: Lamb Cutlets Shrewsbury
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the lamb cutlets and brown on both sides in fat or oil.
2. Slice the button mushrooms and soften them in the same pan.
3. Put the meat and mushrooms in a casserole dish.
4. In a small pan, heat the Worcester sauce, redcurrant jelly, and lemon juice. Blend together.
5. In the remaining fat in the pan, fry the flour until golden (10 minutes on gentle heat).
6. Stir in the mixed liquids. Bring to a boil, stirring.
7. Add enough stock to make a thick sauce. Season to taste and strain over the cutlets.
8. Cook in a pre-heated 170°C oven until tender (1-2 hours or so).
9. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
